#docray element v1.7 sections=1
#legend #section width height | H1..H9/TI/Q/P text | LI level o|b label text | r font size style [href#<uri>] text | TB cols col-width... | c row col rowspan colspan text | I [width height] | BR page|column|section | ~page N | pt, authored flow; no resolved coordinates
#section 612 792
~page 1
P outside page one
~page 1
TB 1 144
c 0 0 1 1 table page one\ntable page two\nnested page two\nnested page three\ntextbox page three\ntextbox page four
r Fixture_Sans 11 -#336699 table page one
r Fixture_Sans 11 -#336699 table page two
~page 1
P table page one
~page 2
P table page two
~page 2
TB 1 72
c 0 0 1 1 nested page two\nnested page three
r Fixture_Sans 11 -#336699 nested page two
r Fixture_Sans 11 -#336699 nested page three
~page 3
P textbox page three
~page 4
P textbox page four
~page 4
P outside page four
